Documentation.short_help: Export partitioned collection to WSL Exodus, run run.sh, load result.exo.
Documentation.long_help: Accepts vtkPartitionedDataSetCollection (e.g. from SHYX DataSet To Partitioned Collection). Writes Input Exodus File Name under Work Directory (default UNC \\\\wsl.localhost\\Ubuntu-24.04\\home\\shyx\\Test), optionally runs Run Script Wsl Path via WSL (default /home/shyx/Test/run.sh in the same directory), then reads Result Exodus File Name (default result.exo) from the work directory into the output.

StringVectorProperty.name: WorkDirectory
StringVectorProperty.label: Work Directory
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Directory for input.exo and result.exo. On Windows use the WSL UNC path (e.g. \\wsl.localhost\Ubuntu-24.04\home\shyx\Test).

StringVectorProperty.name: WslDistribution
StringVectorProperty.label: WSL Distribution
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: WSL distribution name for `wsl -d` when Run Script is enabled.

StringVectorProperty.name: RunScriptWslPath
StringVectorProperty.label: Run Script (WSL path)
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Absolute path to run.sh inside WSL (default /home/shyx/Test/run.sh, same folder as input/result Exodus).

StringVectorProperty.name: InputExoFileName
StringVectorProperty.label: Input Exodus File Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Exodus file name written under Work Directory before simulation.

StringVectorProperty.name: ResultExoFileName
StringVectorProperty.label: Result Exodus File Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Exodus file name read from Work Directory after simulation.

StringVectorProperty.name: OptionFilePath
StringVectorProperty.label: Option File
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Option file on Windows (use the file picker). On Apply it is copied with overwrite into the WSL work directory before run.sh. Leave empty to skip.

StringVectorProperty.name: OptionFileWslName
StringVectorProperty.label: Option File Name (WSL)
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Target file name under the WSL work directory (same folder as run.sh). Default opt.

IntVectorProperty.name: RunScript
IntVectorProperty.label: Run Script
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When enabled, invoke Run Script (WSL path) via WSL after writing the input Exodus file.
